attributes.preview:
# MBD4 Full Intelligence Report — v3
**Generated:** 2026-04-27  
**Scope:** ATR/WEE1 synthetic lethality axis + HAP1-MBD4-KO cell line status  
**Analyses completed:** A1, A1b, A2, A3, A4, A5, A6, A7, A8, A9 + In Silico (IS-1, IS-2)  
**Data sources:** DepMap 23Q4 (local), PRISM 20Q2 (figshare), GDSC2 release 8.5 (Sanger/cancerrxgene.org), cBioPortal TCGA PanCancer Atlas 2018, PMC full-text (PATRIOT, NETc, berzosertib HGSOC trial, Saxena 2024, Chabot 2022, Wang 2023), LINCS1000 (local), DeepPurpose DAVIS  
**v3 changes:** Added A9 (GDSC2 pharmacology benchmark); updated evidence matrix; added Section 10 (isogenic ATRi IC50 protocol); minor corrections to BH scope documentation

---

## Section 1: HAP1-MBD4-KO Cell Line Status

### Cellosaurus-Confirmed Clones
| Clone | RRID | Catalog | KO Method | Status |
|-------|------|---------|-----------|--------|
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 1 | CVCL_SX48 | HZGHC000921c002 | CRISPR/Cas9, 2bp del | Discontinued (Revvity) |
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 2 | CVCL_SX49 | HZGHC000921c003 | CRISPR/Cas9 | Discontinued (Revvity) |
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 3 | CVCL_SX50 | HZGHC000921c009 | CRISPR/Cas9 | Discontinued (Revvity) |
| HAP1 MBD4 (-) 4 | CVCL_SX51 | HZGHC000921c011 | CRISPR/Cas9, 404bp ins | Discontinued (Revvity) |

**All 4 Revvity clones discontinued** as of Dec 2024.

### Ordering Priority (Updated)
| Priority | Source | Cell | Contact | Notes |
|----------|--------|------|---------|-------|
| **P1** | Rodrigues lab (Institut Curie) | HAP1-MBD4-KO (Chabot 2022 clone) | manuel.rodrigues@curie.fr | 2bp del exon 2; gemcitabine IC50 verified |
| **P2** | Creative Biomart | CL-0108 | creativebiomart.net | Same clone as Chabot 2022; catalog available |
| **P3** | In-house CRISPR | HAP1 parental (C631) + guide | — | 4–6 weeks; HAP1 available |
| **P4** | Revvity Made-to-Order | Custom HAP1-MBD4-KO | — | 8–12 weeks; expensive |

### ATRi/WEE1i Data in HAP1-MBD4-KO
**NONE EXISTS.** No published IC50, AUC, or viability data for any ATRi, WEE1i, or CHK1i in any HAP1-M
